sigils.usage: Character codification, identity pages, deeper Underlay resonance moments.
sigils.color: Depends on character-specific resonance. Must remain identity-linked, not generic.
sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Represents the Core of Being. Soulflame is not a state and not a phenomenon. It expresses the unchangeable inner identity of a person.
sigils.name: Soulflame Sigil
sigils.geometry: Energy-oriented symbolic structure; should read as living continuity rather than mechanical command.

sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Cognitive clarity without emotional suppression. A mastery state, not a personality replacement.
sigils.name: Top-Clear-Mind
sigils.geometry: Radial symmetry, disciplined calm, internal clarity.

sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Structural stability of conscious existence under weight.
sigils.name: Top-Solid-Anchor / Sha-karys

sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Alignment or resonance between two entities.
sigils.name: Zenga Zellia
